tasks.title: FlagManager Instantiation and Initialization
tasks.description: Find application entry point and instantiate FlagManager at application startup. Call flags.load_from_env() immediately after instantiation. Store FlagManager in globally accessible location (AppState, RuntimeContext).
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify FlagManager can be instantiated
AddUnitTest: verify load_from_env() populates flag values from environment
AddIntegrationTest: verify FlagManager is accessible from application context
tasks.impl_notes: Find main.rs, lib.rs, or config init. Store FlagManager in AppState or RuntimeContext.

tasks.title: Unit Tests for Boolean Flags
tasks.description: Create unit tests for all boolean flags: new_manager_has_all_boolean_flags (check all 28 boolean flags including OPENCODE_EXPERIMENTAL, OPENCODE_DEBUG, OPENCODE_AUTO_SHARE), default_values_are_false_except_markdown (only OPENCODE_EXPERIMENTAL_MARKDOWN defaults to true), set_overrides_value, unknown_flag_returns_false, exa_enabled_when_experimental_is_true, plan_mode_enabled_when_experimental_is_true.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify new_manager_has_all_boolean_flags - all 28 boolean flags registered
AddUnitTest: verify default_values_are_false_except_markdown - only OPENCODE_EXPERIMENTAL_MARKDOWN defaults to true
AddUnitTest: verify set_overrides_value - Boolean set() correctly overrides default
AddUnitTest: verify unknown_flag_returns_false - Missing flags return false from is_enabled()
AddUnitTest: verify exa_enabled_when_experimental_is_true - opencode_enable_exa() works when experimental=true
AddUnitTest: verify plan_mode_enabled_when_experimental_is_true - opencode_experimental_plan_mode() works
tasks.impl_notes: Test all 28 boolean flags: OPENCODE_EXPERIMENTAL, OPENCODE_DEBUG, OPENCODE_AUTO_SHARE, etc.

tasks.title: Unit Tests for String and Number Flags
tasks.description: Create unit tests for string and number flags: opencode_client_defaults_to_cli (returns 'cli' by default), bash_timeout_has_default (returns Some(120_000)), string_flag_returns_none_when_not_set (get_string() returns None), number_flag_returns_none_when_not_set (get_number() returns None).
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify opencode_client_defaults_to_cli - opencode_client() returns 'cli' by default
AddUnitTest: verify bash_timeout_has_default - opencode_experimental_bash_timeout_ms() returns Some(120_000)
AddUnitTest: verify string_flag_returns_none_when_not_set - get_string() returns None when env not set
AddUnitTest: verify number_flag_returns_none_when_not_set - get_number() returns None when env not set
tasks.impl_notes: Test 11 string flags and 2 number flags.

tasks.title: Register OPENCODE_EXPERIMENTAL_EXA Flag
tasks.description: Register OPENCODE_EXPERIMENTAL_EXA in FlagManager::new() with default false. OR remove the truthy('OPENCODE_EXPERIMENTAL_EXA') check if not needed. Verify opencode_enable_exa() method works correctly.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify OPENCODE_EXPERIMENTAL_EXA flag is registered with default false
AddUnitTest: verify opencode_enable_exa() returns correct value based on flag state
AddRegressionTest: ensure opencode_enable_exa() method works when experimental=true
tasks.impl_notes: Either register the flag in FlagManager::new() or remove the truthy check.

tasks.title: Refactor load_from_env() to Use truthy() Helper
tasks.description: Refactor load_from_env() to use truthy() helper instead of inline check. Change from flag.value = val == '1' || val.to_lowercase() == 'true' to flag.value = truthy(name). Remove duplicate truthy check code.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify load_from_env() uses truthy() helper for boolean parsing
AddRegressionTest: ensure boolean flags still load correctly from environment
tasks.impl_notes: Replace inline boolean parsing with truthy(name) helper call.

tasks.title: Add Setter Methods for String and Number Flags
tasks.description: Add set_string(&mut self, name: &str, value: Option<String>) method and set_number(&mut self, name: &str, value: Option<u64>) method. Methods should only update if flag exists (silent no-op otherwise).
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify set_string() updates string flag value when flag exists
AddUnitTest: verify set_string() is no-op when flag does not exist
AddUnitTest: verify set_number() updates number flag value when flag exists
AddUnitTest: verify set_number() is no-op when flag does not exist
tasks.impl_notes: Silent no-op when flag doesn't exist.

tasks.title: Add Method to List All Flags
tasks.description: Add all_flags(&self) -> &HashMap<String, Flag> getter, all_string_flags(&self) -> &HashMap<String, Option<String>> getter, and all_number_flags(&self) -> &HashMap<String, Option<u64>> getter. Useful for debugging and admin interfaces.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify all_flags() returns all boolean flags
AddUnitTest: verify all_string_flags() returns all string flags
AddUnitTest: verify all_number_flags() returns all number flags
tasks.impl_notes: Getters for debugging and admin interfaces.

tasks.title: Application Integration - Replace Hardcoded Feature Checks
tasks.description: Audit codebase for hardcoded OPENCODE_* env var checks (grep). Replace hardcoded feature checks with FlagManager queries. Ensure all feature toggles use the flag system.
test_criteria: AddIntegrationTest: verify all OPENCODE_* env var checks use FlagManager
RunTestSuite: execute full test suite to ensure no regressions after replacing hardcoded checks
tasks.impl_notes: Grep codebase for hardcoded env var checks and replace with FlagManager queries.
